add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.title: Add Multi-Level Table of Contents to PDF
add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a TOC page, configure TocInfo, and add hierarchical Heading objects with page numbers to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-title-page.title: Create PDF Title Page with Custom Font and Color
create-pdf-title-page.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document with a title page using Aspose.Pdf, applying a custom font, size, color, and alignment, and handling cross‑platform save issues.

generate-searchable-pdf-from-scanned.title: Generate Searchable PDF from Scanned Document
generate-searchable-pdf-from-scanned.description: Loads a scanned PDF, defines an OCR callback that returns HOCR for each page, converts the document to overlay invisible searchable text, and saves the result as a searchable PDF.

insert-high-res-image-into-pdf.title: Insert High‑Resolution Image into PDF
insert-high-res-image-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a high‑resolution image to a PDF page at specific absolute coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B Compliance and Log Results
validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to validate a PDF against the PDF/A‑1B standard and write a log file containing any non‑conformant elements.

validate-pdf-a1a-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A‑1A Compliance and Generate Report
validate-pdf-a1a-compliance.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to check a PDF file for PDF/A‑1A compliance and save a detailed validation report.

add-digital-signature-field-to-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Self‑Signed Certificate
add-digital-signature-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field on a PDF page, configure a PKCS#7 signature using a self‑signed PFX certificate, and apply the signature to the document.

set-pdf-expiration-date.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
set-pdf-expiration-date.description: Shows how to embed a document‑level JavaScript open action using Aspose.Pdf so the PDF automatically expires and closes after a specified date.

read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata (Author and Title)
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: The example opens an existing PDF, reads its Author and Title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the modified document to a new file.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-permissio.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Set Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-permissio.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, define specific permissions, and save the protected document.

custom-toc-formatting-with-tab-leaders.title: Custom TOC Formatting with Tab Leaders
custom-toc-formatting-with-tab-leaders.description: Shows how to create a Table of Contents page, hide page numbers, set custom tab leaders for each heading level, and add linked headings using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-word-in-pdf.title: Replace Word in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-word-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a specific word in a PDF and replace it with another word using Aspose.Pdf, while keeping the original text formatting intact.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Footer
add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.description: Shows how to insert dynamic page numbers into the footer of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

attach-pdf-portfolio-with-description.title: Attach PDF Portfolio with Custom Description
attach-pdf-portfolio-with-description.description: Shows how to embed another PDF as a portfolio file into an existing PDF and assign a custom description and document metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-user-signature-field-with-style.title: Add User Signature Field with Styled Appearance to PDF
add-user-signature-field-with-style.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature form field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set its default appearance to match the document style, and apply visual styling such as border and background color.

add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.title: Add Indented Paragraph with Custom Line Spacing to PDF
add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a TextParagraph with first‑line and subsequent‑line indentation, applies custom line spacing, and inserts it onto the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-image-in-pdf-page.title: Replace Image on PDF Page
replace-image-in-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a specific PDF page with a new image while preserving its layout using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages
add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use a template PDF page as a background stamp and apply it to every page of another PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

remove-pdf-page-and-renumber.title: Remove a PDF Page and Renumber Remaining Pages
remove-pdf-page-and-renumber.description: Shows how to delete a specific page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, automatically renumbering the remaining pages with basic validation and file handling.

insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert an empty page at the beginning as a cover sheet, and save the modified document.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, clear all annotations, and save a clean, annotation‑free PDF.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to remove interactive form fields from a PDF and render their current values as static content using Aspose.Pdf.

check-pdf-incremental-updates.title: Check PDF for Incremental Updates using Aspose.Pdf
check-pdf-incremental-updates.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, verifying the file exists, and detecting whether the document contains incremental updates.

create-pdf-with-clickable-index.title: Create PDF with Clickable Index
create-pdf-with-clickable-index.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains an index page where each entry links to its corresponding section using Aspose.Pdf link annotations and GoTo actions.

interrupt-resume-pdf-save.title: Interrupt and Resume PDF Save Operation
interrupt-resume-pdf-save.description: Shows how to start an asynchronous PDF save with Aspose.Pdf, interrupt it using an InterruptMonitor, and then resume the save operation.

clean-pdf-remove-metadata-javascript-att.title: Clean PDF by Removing Metadata, JavaScript, and Attachments
clean-pdf-remove-metadata-javascript-att.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, stripping all document metadata, clearing embedded JavaScript actions, deleting file attachment annotations, and optimizing the file to reduce its size.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a clickable hyperlink annotation that opens an external website in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-watermark-layer-and-merge-pdf.title: Add Watermark Layer and Merge PDF Layers
add-watermark-layer-and-merge-pdf.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates an optional content group (layer) containing an image watermark on each page, merges the new layer with existing content, and saves the result.

embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify Attachment
embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file as an attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then verify that the attachment exists.

add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Company Logo Header to PDF Pages
add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating an ImageStamp from a logo image, positioning it as a top‑center header on each page, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-digital-signature-with-tsa-timestamp.title: Add Digital Signature with TSA Timestamp to PDF
add-digital-signature-with-tsa-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a PKCS#7 digital signature on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and include a trusted Time‑Stamp Authority timestamp.

merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Shows how to combine two PDF files into one document and keep the original bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf's Document class.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each image as a PNG file while preserving its original resolution.

monitor-pdf-generation-progress.title: Monitor PDF Generation Progress with Custom Progress Handler
monitor-pdf-generation-progress.description: Shows how to track PDF generation progress using Aspose.Pdf's custom progress handler during a document save operation, allowing UI or console updates.

create-pdf-header-with-current-date.title: Create PDF Header with Current Date using JavaScript
create-pdf-header-with-current-date.description: Shows how to add a read‑only date field to a PDF header and populate it with the current date via a JavaScript open action using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-crash-report-pdf.title: Generate Crash Report PDF from Exception
generate-crash-report-pdf.description: Shows how to create an HTML crash report for an exception using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions and then convert that report to a PDF document.

add-checked-checkbox-form-field.title: Add Checked Checkbox Form Field to PDF
add-checked-checkbox-form-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a checkbox form field, set its default state to checked, and save the file.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to bundle several PDF documents into a single PDF portfolio container using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-html-fragments-to-pdf.title: Combine Multiple HTML Fragments into a Single PDF
combine-html-fragments-to-pdf.description: Shows how to convert a list of HTML strings into one PDF document using Aspose.Pdf with custom HtmlLoadOptions and platform‑specific GDI+ handling.

add-line-annotation-custom-color-thickne.title: Add Line Annotation with Custom Color and Thickness to PDF
add-line-annotation-custom-color-thickne.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a line annotation, set its color and border width, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-open-action-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to PDF
add-javascript-open-action-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that an alert dialog appears when the document is opened.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to XML
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to retrieve the embedded XMP metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and save it as an XML document.

add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.title: Add Accessibility Tags to PDF (Headings, Paragraphs, Tables)
add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API to add semantic accessibility tags such as headings, paragraphs, and tables to a PDF and set document language and title.

create-landscape-pdf-page.title: Create PDF with Landscape Page Orientation
create-landscape-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set an A4 page to landscape by swapping width and height, optionally rotate the page content 90°, and save the document.

rasterize-pdf-pages-to-images-html.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to Images during HTML Conversion
rasterize-pdf-pages-to-images-html.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML while rasterizing each page as external PNG images using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-creation-modification-keywords.title: Set PDF Creation/Modification Dates and Keywords
set-pdf-creation-modification-keywords.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its creation and modification dates and custom keywords, then save the updated file.

print-pdf-via-default-viewer.title: Print PDF Document via Default Viewer
print-pdf-via-default-viewer.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Document and uses the OS default PDF viewer's print verb to send the document directly to the printer.

create-pdf-clickable-table-of-contents.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
create-pdf-clickable-table-of-contents.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF that includes a table of contents page with entries linked to section headings using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-page-with-html.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-Generated Page
replace-pdf-page-with-html.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific page in an existing PDF with a new page created from HTML content using Aspose.Pdf's HTML-to-PDF conversion.

create-zugferd-compliant-pdf-invoice.title: Create ZUGFeRD Compliant PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
create-zugferd-compliant-pdf-invoice.description: The example creates a simple PDF invoice, embeds a ZUGFeRD XML file, converts the document to PDF/A‑3 (ZUGFeRD) format, and saves it.

create-pdf-multiple-page-sizes.title: Create PDF with Multiple Page Sizes and Orientations
create-pdf-multiple-page-sizes.description: Demonstrates adding pages with different sizes and portrait/landscape orientations to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including platform‑aware saving handling.

add-popup-note-annotation.title: Add Pop‑up Note Annotation to PDF
add-popup-note-annotation.description: Shows how to create a sticky‑note (TextAnnotation) with a linked PopupAnnotation that displays detailed information when the user hovers over the note.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Shows how to load a PDF portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its embedded files, and save each file to a specified directory.

create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.title: Create PDF with Clickable Email Link
create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a mailto: email link using Aspose.Pdf, adding visible text, a link annotation, and handling platform‑specific save issues.

add-readonly-text-field-with-default-val.title: Add Read‑Only Text Field with Default Value to PDF
add-readonly-text-field-with-default-val.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a TextBoxField with a default value, and set the field to read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption, disable printing and copying via permissions, and save the encrypted document.

process-pdf-with-crash-reporting.title: Process PDF with Crash Reporting and Error Handling
process-pdf-with-crash-reporting.description: Loads a PDF, adds a blank page, saves it to a separate output folder, and uses try‑catch blocks to generate detailed Aspose.Pdf crash reports for both library‑specific and unexpected errors.

add-js-calc-total-field.title: Add JavaScript Calculation for Total PDF Form Field
add-js-calc-total-field.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to automatically sum numeric form fields and display the result in a total field.

add-semi-transparent-background-to-pdf-p.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-background-to-pdf-p.description: Shows how to fill an entire PDF page with a semi‑transparent colored rectangle by using Aspose.Pdf's drawing objects.

add-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.title: Add Link Annotation to Open Embedded PDF Attachment
add-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file into another PDF and create a link annotation that opens the embedded attachment when clicked.

sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Info
sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.description: Demonstrates how to clear PDF metadata and private information such as search indexes using Aspose.Pdf's RemoveMetadata and optimization options, then save the sanitized document.

extract-text-from-pdf-page-range.title: Extract Text from Specific PDF Page Range
extract-text-from-pdf-page-range.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text from a defined range of pages using TextAbsorber, and write the extracted content to a plain text file.

create-pdf-form-with-dropdown.title: Create PDF Form with Dropdown List
create-pdf-form-with-dropdown.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document containing a combo box form field and populate it with options from an array using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-image-to-last-page.title: Add Signature Image to Last Page of PDF
add-signature-image-to-last-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp from a signature PNG, position it on the document's last page, and save the signed PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and embed a TrueType font so the document renders consistently on any device.

add-styled-table-to-pdf.title: Add Styled Table with Borders and Alternating Row Colors to PDF
add-styled-table-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a table with defined column widths, apply borders and alternating row background colors, and insert it into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page number stamp that automatically updates when pages are added or removed using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a semi‑transparent PNG as a watermark artifact to each page, and save the modified document.

create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.title: Create PDF Table with Rich Text Formatting
create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a table where each cell holds text with different formatting such as bold, italic, underline, color, and size using Aspose.Pdf.

create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.title: Create 5x7 Inch Postcard PDF with Custom Page Size
create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF of postcard size (5×7 inches) using Aspose.Pdf, set a custom page size, add sample text, and handle platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

create-pdf-with-date-picker-form-field.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
create-pdf-with-date-picker-form-field.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document and add a date picker (DateField) form field using Aspose.Pdf.

check-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.title: Check for Hidden Annotations in a PDF
check-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through all pages and their annotations, and returns true if any annotation has the Hidden flag set (after sanitization).

add-page-count-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Page Count Footer to PDF Pages
add-page-count-footer-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom footer that displays the current page number and total page count on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-line-annotation-separator-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Line Annotation Separator to PDF Page
add-line-annotation-separator-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert a horizontal line annotation as a visual separator on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified document.

create-pdf-with-radio-button-form.title: Create PDF with Radio Button Form Fields
create-pdf-with-radio-button-form.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing radio button groups for multiple‑choice questions using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

export-pdf-pages-to-png-no-compression.title: Export PDF Pages to PNG without Image Compression
export-pdf-pages-to-png-no-compression.description: Shows how to disable image compression when converting PDF pages to PNG images with Aspose.Pdf, preserving the original image data and quality.

remove-embedded-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove Embedded JavaScript from PDF
remove-embedded-javascript-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, deletes all embedded JavaScript scripts, and saves the sanitized document.

add-custom-xml-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XML Metadata to PDF Document
add-custom-xml-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom XML entry to a PDF's DocumentInfo dictionary and embed optional XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

specify-crash-report-directory.title: Specify Crash Report Directory and Generate Report
specify-crash-report-directory.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom output folder for Aspose.Pdf crash reports using CrashReportOptions, generate the HTML report, and verify its creation.

customize-crash-report-filename.title: Customize Crash Report Filename with CrashReportOptions
customize-crash-report-filename.description: Shows how to set a custom message and filename for an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions and generate the report with PdfException.GenerateCrashReport.

sanitize-pdf-optional-rasterization.title: Sanitize PDF and Optionally Rasterize Pages
sanitize-pdf-optional-rasterization.description: Shows how to remove hidden data from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HiddenDataSanitizer and optionally rasterize pages via PdfSaveOptions.

sanitize-pdf-remove-hidden-data.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Data
sanitize-pdf-remove-hidden-data.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, strip metadata and compliance information, flatten forms and annotations, optimize resources, and save a sanitized copy.

create-pdf-with-template-background.title: Create PDF with Template Background Using Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-with-template-background.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF page as a template and stamping it as a background on multiple new pages, then adding custom content on top using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-pdf-sanitization.title: Batch PDF Sanitization and Export
batch-pdf-sanitization.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, sanitize each by removing metadata, flattening form fields, and optimizing resources, then save the cleaned versions to a target directory.

extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through pages and link annotations, collect external URL actions, and write the URLs to a plain‑text list.

pdf-sanitization-with-auditing.title: PDF Sanitization with Start/End Time Logging
pdf-sanitization-with-auditing.description: Demonstrates how to sanitize a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, record the operation's start and end timestamps, and write a validation log for auditing purposes.

create-pdf-with-dynamic-table.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Table from DataTable
create-pdf-with-dynamic-table.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document containing a table whose rows are populated dynamically from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-crash-report-to-network-sha.title: Generate PDF Crash Report to Network Share
generate-pdf-crash-report-to-network-sha.description: Demonstrates configuring Aspose.Pdf CrashReportOptions to write a crash report to a UNC network share and verifies the file creation.

extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.title: Extract and Print PDF Outline Hierarchy
extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.description: Loads a PDF file, accesses its outline (bookmark) collection, and recursively prints the hierarchical structure to the console.

add-javascript-sum-calculation-to-pdf-fo.title: Add JavaScript Sum Calculation to PDF Form
add-javascript-sum-calculation-to-pdf-fo.description: Creates a PDF with two input text fields and a read‑only result field, then attaches a JavaScript OnCalculate action that sums the inputs and displays the result.

multi-page-table-pdf.title: Create Multi-Page Table in PDF
multi-page-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF with a table that automatically breaks across pages, repeats the header row, and includes platform‑specific handling for GDI+ when saving.

remove-annotations-and-embedded-files.title: Remove Annotations and Embedded Files from PDF
remove-annotations-and-embedded-files.description: Shows how to strip all page annotations and embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the cleaned document.

apply-decimal-numbering-to-headings.title: Apply Decimal Numbering to Hierarchical Headings in PDF
apply-decimal-numbering-to-headings.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with chapter and sub‑section headings that are automatically numbered using decimal (Arabic) style and hierarchical levels.

add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Heading to PDF
add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a level‑1 heading with dynamic content (user name and date), apply basic styling, insert it on the first page, and save the modified document.

add-new-bookmark-to-pdf-outline.title: Add New Bookmark to PDF Outline
add-new-bookmark-to-pdf-outline.description: Demonstrates how to create a new outline (bookmark) in an existing PDF, set its title and page destination using GoToAction, add it to the document's outline collection, and save the updated file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG with 80% Quality and Optimize Embedded Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.description: The example loads a PDF, applies JPEG compression (quality 80) to embedded images using OptimizationOptions, and then saves each page as a separate JPEG file with the same quality.

add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.title: Add Captions Below Images in PDF
add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over each image on every PDF page and insert a styled text caption beneath the image using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-pdf-page-into-another.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF
insert-pdf-page-into-another.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf, extract a specific page from the source PDF, and insert it at a given position in the target PDF before saving the result.

rasterize-pdf-to-lossless-png.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to Lossless PNG with Compression Level
rasterize-pdf-to-lossless-png.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring image compression options for lossless PNG output, and rasterizing each page to PNG files at a specified resolution.

remove-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript and Sensitive Content from PDF
remove-javascript-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, configure hidden‑data sanitization options to strip JavaScript, annotations, and private information, and save the cleaned document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.title: Create PDF with Level 1 Heading
create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF document, add a Level 1 heading using a TextFragment, and save the file while handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert each page of a PDF document into separate PNG image files and validates the result with a unit test.

sanitize-pdf-hidden-data-keep-metadata.title: Sanitize PDF Hidden Data While Keeping Metadata
sanitize-pdf-hidden-data-keep-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's hidden‑data sanitization to remove all hidden content from a PDF while preserving its metadata such as title and author.

add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.title: Add Visible Signature Field and Lock PDF after Signing
add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a visible signature field in a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate, and lock the document to prevent further changes.

load-pdf-document-and-save-copy.title: Load PDF Document and Save a Copy
load-pdf-document-and-save-copy.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, checking its page count, and saving a copy of the document.

sanitize-multiple-pdfs.title: Sanitize Multiple PDFs and Save Cleaned Versions
sanitize-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading several PDF files, removing metadata, flattening form fields, stripping PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance, optimizing resources, and saving the cleaned PDFs to a target folder.

create-pdf-table-with-merged-header.title: Create PDF Table with Merged Header Cells
create-pdf-table-with-merged-header.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a table whose first header row spans all columns, using Aspose.Pdf. It also shows adding a second header row, data rows, and handling platform‑specific saving.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all textual content using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

generate-pdf-headings-and-sanitize.title: Generate PDF with Auto‑Numbered Headings and Sanitize to Preserve Heading Structure
generate-pdf-headings-and-sanitize.description: The example creates an in‑memory PDF containing auto‑numbered headings using Aspose.Pdf, then produces a sanitized version that retains only the heading objects while discarding other content, handling cross‑platform saving issues.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, clear every annotation on each page, and save the sanitized document.

generate-crash-report-for-pdfexception.title: Generate Crash Report for PdfException
generate-crash-report-for-pdfexception.description: Demonstrates how to catch a PdfException, configure CrashReportOptions, and generate an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-hidden-data-reapply-headings.title: Remove Hidden Data and Re‑Apply Headings in a PDF
remove-hidden-data-reapply-headings.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stripping metadata, compliance flags, and unused resources, then re‑enabling automatic tagging to generate heading structures before saving the cleaned document.

sanitize-pdf-auto-tag-headings.title: Sanitize PDF and Auto‑Tag Headings for Navigation
sanitize-pdf-auto-tag-headings.description: The example loads a PDF, removes metadata and compliance flags, enables Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging with heading recognition, sets language and title, and saves a clean, navigable PDF document.

add-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a TextStamp with a custom message, configure its appearance, apply it to every page, and save the updated document.

set-pdf-page-rotation-90-degrees.title: Set PDF Page Rotation to 90 Degrees
set-pdf-page-rotation-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying a 90‑degree rotation to each page for portrait display on landscape devices, and saving the modified document.

generate-custom-crash-report-pdf.title: Generate Custom Crash Report for PDF Operations
generate-custom-crash-report-pdf.description: Demonstrates catching PDF processing errors and generating an HTML crash report with a custom stack trace using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdf-pages-to-images.title: Batch Convert PDF Pages to Images with Hidden Data Sanitization
batch-convert-pdf-pages-to-images.description: Demonstrates sanitizing a PDF to remove hidden data and converting each page into separate image files using HiddenDataSanitizer.SanitizeAllToImages.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution TIFF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.description: Shows how to load a PDF, specify a DPI, and convert each page into a separate high‑resolution TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice.
